Home › Brevard County

County hub · Updated June 2026

Brevard County Restaurant Health Grades

66%Grade A
4.2Avg rating
298Restaurants
9Cities

Not every kitchen in Brevard County passes cleanly. Of the 298 we grade, 196 hold an A — but 21 sit at D or F. Some are popular anyway: GRILLS SEAFOOD DECK & TIKI BAR pulls 4.5 stars despite a D grade. The grades below cut through the reviews.

Cities in Brevard County

  • Melbourne 86
  • Cocoa Beach 39
  • Titusville 33
  • Palm Bay 21
  • West Melbourne 19
  • Merritt Island 18
  • Cape Canaveral 17
  • Rockledge 15
  • Cocoa 12

Health & local favorites

  • Lowest Health Scores in Brevard County (21)

Browse Brevard County by diet & cuisine

  • Dairy-Free (92)
  • Gluten-Free (59)
  • Healthy Options (129)
  • Keto (100)
  • Nut-Aware (21)

  • Vegan (51)

Brevard County restaurant health grades — FAQ

How are Brevard County restaurant health grades calculated?

Florida issues no official grades, so we calculate an A–F score from each restaurant's most recent DBPR inspection — starting at 100 points and deducting for high-priority, intermediate, and basic violations. Of the 298 Brevard County restaurants we grade, 196 currently hold an A.

Does Florida assign letter grades to Brevard County restaurants?

No. The Florida Department of Business and Professional Regulation (DBPR) inspects restaurants and records violations but does not grade them. The grades shown here are calculated by us from those public inspection records.

How many restaurants are graded in Brevard County?

We currently publish 298 graded restaurants in Brevard County, with an average diner rating of 4.2 stars; 196 hold an A health grade.

See the full scoring method on our methodology page.

Central Florida Restaurants

Restaurant health inspection grades, dietary options, and diner ratings across Central Florida. Inspection data from Florida DBPR public records.
